operating_ranges.evidence: Manual adjustment capability: Grind size adjustment by 1/100 mm increments
Grinding Capacity Bean Hopper Left [mm/s]: 5,50 default, Lower Limit Grinding Capacity Left [mm/s]: 1,00
Grinding Capacity Bean Hopper Right [mm/s]: 5,50 default, Lower Limit Grinding Capacity Right [mm/s]: 1,00
Target extraction time range: 21 to 23 seconds, Average extraction time for two espressos at 25 ml each is 21 to 23 seconds
Bean Hopper Capacity: 1 x 1 kg bean hopper
Bean Hopper Capacities: 1 x 0.5 kg bean hopper

degradation_mechanisms.evidence: The service of Eversys coffee machines depends on the number of brewing chambers: Légacy range: 12 months or every 50'000 products

fault_conditions.name: bean_hopper_empty_or_locked
fault_conditions.description: Bean hopper right is empty or locked
fault_conditions.symptoms: Please refill or unlock the bean hopper
fault_conditions.evidence: Error Code: S-010, Error Message: Bean hopper right is empty or locked. Please refill or unlock the bean hopper.

fault_conditions.name: grinder_blocked
fault_conditions.description: The grinder may be blocked or damaged
fault_conditions.evidence: Ensure that no foreign object get into the bean hopper(s). The grinder may be blocked or damaged.

maintenance_actions.name: service_maintenance
maintenance_actions.evidence: The service of Eversys coffee machines depends on the number of brewing chambers: Légacy range: 12 months or every 50'000 products

assumptions.statement: Grinder burrs are sharp cutting components that require safety precautions
assumptions.reason: Manual states 'Never try to reach into the grinder. Grinder burrs are sharp and may cause injury.'

assumptions.statement: Bean hopper position affects grinding capability
assumptions.reason: Manual indicates 'When unlocked the bean hopper is loose, and it will not be possible to grind coffee (closed position).'
